title: WIHP Ithuluzi Lokubiza Elingenamkhawulo
subtitle: Bhala noma yiliphi igama → Thola i-IPA ku-Wiktionary → Guqulela ku-Hangul!
inputPlaceholder: Bhala noma yiliphi igama (isibonelo: Sawubona, Ngiyakuthanda...)
canConvert: Ungaguqula amagama avela ezilimini ezingu-117 emhlabeni, kufaka phakathi izilimi ezingaphezu kuka-20 zaseNdiya!
philosophy: Amagama akufanele abe nemingcele. WIHP ibonga i-Wiktionary IPA.
